name: Defiance Survivors
short_description: Defiance Survivors is a fantasy style casual Roguelike game. There are two modes in the game. To become a hero and survive among monsters, Or to become a summoner summoning monsters and hunting heroes. Both modes exist independently and can be freely chosen.
detailed_description:
Resistance Survivors is a fantasy-style leisurely Roguelike game with two game modes.

In both modes, there is a system for strengthening character skills, and characters can be strengthened by upgrading different skills.


Resistance Mode: In this mode, players play the role of a summoner who summons monsters.

There are 6 types of monsters that need to be selected before the game starts. After clearing different levels of difficulty, new monsters will be unlocked one after another.


In the game, 6 types of monsters are summoned to fight the heroes. If you defeat the heroes before the countdown ends, you will win.


Survival Mode: In this mode, the player assumes the role of a hero.

Choose a hero before the game starts. After passing different levels of difficulty, new heroes will be unlocked one after another.


In the game, the hero wins if he survives the monster attack until the countdown ends.


The above is the general gameplay of the game.

supported_languages: English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
